topics.topic: Handling race conditions in Laravel applications
topics.context: concurrent requests updating the same data, database locking issues, and inconsistent state in production systems
topics.notes: include pessimistic vs optimistic locking, transactions, unique constraints, and queue-based serialization strategies

topics.topic: Designing a scalable notification system in Laravel
topics.context: sending notifications via email, SMS, and push with high throughput and reliability
topics.notes: include queueing notifications, channel separation, retry handling, rate limiting, and user preference management

topics.topic: Preventing duplicate payments and transactions in Laravel
topics.context: handling double submissions, retry requests, and payment gateway callbacks safely
topics.notes: include idempotency keys, database constraints, transaction handling, and webhook validation

topics.topic: Building a dynamic feature flag system in Laravel
topics.context: enabling or disabling features without deployments and managing feature rollout
topics.notes: include database-driven flags, caching, user targeting, percentage rollout, and fallback strategies

topics.topic: Designing a scalable search system in Laravel applications
topics.context: handling full-text search, filtering, and performance issues with large datasets
topics.notes: include MySQL full-text search vs external tools, indexing strategies, caching results, and pagination optimization

topics.topic: Handling file uploads at scale in Laravel applications
topics.context: large file uploads, network failures, and storage management in production systems
topics.notes: include chunked uploads, presigned URLs, queue-based processing, and cleaning orphaned files

topics.topic: Implementing audit logs for critical actions in Laravel
topics.context: tracking user actions and system changes for debugging and compliance
topics.notes: include activity logging, storing changes, database structure, and querying logs efficiently

topics.topic: Designing a scalable caching strategy in Laravel
topics.context: reducing database load and improving response time in high-traffic applications
topics.notes: include Redis caching patterns, cache invalidation, tagging, and handling stale data

topics.topic: Handling scheduled tasks and cron jobs reliably in Laravel
topics.context: running recurring jobs, avoiding overlaps, and ensuring execution reliability
topics.notes: include Laravel scheduler, without overlapping, distributed locks, and monitoring failed tasks

topics.topic: Building a modular architecture in Laravel applications
topics.context: structuring large codebases into reusable and maintainable modules
topics.notes: include module separation, service providers, dependency management, and integration between modules
